summary: Implement a Resource subclass for an inventory item
prompt: Write a GDScript class that extends Resource and represents an inventory item. It should have exported properties: `item_name: String`, `max_stack: int` (default 99), `icon: Texture2D` (nullable). Add a method `can_stack_with(other: InventoryItem) -> bool` that returns true if the other item has the same item_name and the max_stack is greater than 1. Name the class InventoryItem using the class_name keyword.
evaluation_notes: Must use class_name InventoryItem. Must extend Resource. @export var icon: Texture2D must accept null. can_stack_with must compare item_name, not identity. max_stack default should be 99.
